display_name.he: איך כותבים את הסקיל הראשון שלכם

display_description.he: קורס בן 6 פרקים למפתחים על איך לכתוב סקיל סוכן מאפס. האנטומיה של SKILL.md, ההבדל בין references/ ל־scripts/, ו־10 הטעויות הנפוצות בכתיבה.
display_description.en: A 6-chapter course for developers on writing an agent skill from scratch. SKILL.md anatomy, the references/ vs scripts/ split, and the 10 most common authoring mistakes.

who_is_this_for.he: מפתחים שיודעים git, Markdown, ו־JSON, ורוצים לכתוב סקיל סוכן מאפס לשימוש אישי, לצוות, או לתרומה לקטלוג ציבורי. אין צורך בניסיון קודם עם פורמט הסקילים.
who_is_this_for.en: Developers who know git, Markdown, and JSON, and want to author an agent skill from scratch for personal use, a team, or contribution to a public catalog. No prior experience with the skill format required.

he: להבין מה סקיל באמת הוא ל־LLM ברגע הניתוב, ומתי לבחור בסקיל לעומת MCP / system prompt / CLI
לכתוב SKILL.md עם תיאור שמופעל נכון על ידי ה־LLM (דפוסי Use when / Do NOT use for)
לדעת מתי להישאר עם ה־frontmatter המינימלי ומתי להוסיף sidecar metadata.json לטובת קטלוג
להחליט בין references/ ל־scripts/ לכל תוכן תומך בסקיל
לשתף את הסקיל באחד מארבעה מסלולים: פרטי מקומי, שיתוף עם צוות, קטלוג פנימי, קטלוג ציבורי
להריץ רשימת תיוג 10 דקות לפני שיתוף ולעבור את 10 הטעויות הנפוצות בכתיבה
en: Understand what a skill really is to the LLM at routing time, and when to pick a skill vs MCP / system prompt / CLI
Write a SKILL.md with a description the LLM routes correctly (Use when / Do NOT use for patterns)
Know when to keep the minimal frontmatter and when to add a metadata.json sidecar for a catalog
Decide between references/ and scripts/ for any supporting content
Share your skill via one of four paths: personal local, team handoff, internal catalog, public catalog
Run the 10-minute pre-share checklist and avoid the 10 most common authoring mistakes

images.alt_he: סקיל לעומת MCP לעומת system prompt לעומת CLI
images.alt_en: Skill vs MCP vs system prompt vs CLI
images.prompt: Editorial illustration: a 2x2 grid of four quadrants, each labeled with a tool type and a single tiny icon. Top-left 'Skill' (document with frontmatter lines), top-right 'MCP' (server with network arrows), bottom-left 'System prompt' (chat-bubble icon), bottom-right 'CLI' (terminal cursor). Each quadrant is bordered in navy with a single Israeli-blue accent stripe at the top. Warm beige paper background, flat 2D editorial style, no decoration.

Editorial illustration: a stylized SKILL.md document in the center, with three labeled callouts pointing to its sections. Top callout: 'frontmatter (3 fields: name, description, license)'. Middle callout: 'body (scope, rules, examples)'. Bottom callout: 'optional references/ + scripts/'. Document drawn as a flat rectangle in navy outline. Callout lines and labels in Israeli-blue accent. Warm beige paper background.

Editorial illustration: a flat 2D representation of a JSON file with 9 visible key-value lines labeled with field names: name, version, license, display_name, display_description, audience, level, tags, supported_agents. All values are flat strings or string arrays (no nested objects). Use clean sans-serif and tasteful indentation. Single Israeli-blue accent on the display_description line (the most important field). Warm beige paper background, navy text, no syntax-highlighting colors beyond the one accent.

Editorial illustration: a vertical decision tree with one root question 'What kind of content is it?'. Two branches descending. Left branch labeled 'Deterministic compute or network call?' leading to a box labeled 'scripts/'. Right branch labeled 'Static lookup or template?' leading to a box labeled 'references/'. Arrows in navy with single Israeli-blue accent. Warm beige paper background, minimal.

images.alt_en: Four paths for sharing your skill
images.prompt: Editorial illustration: a 2x2 grid of four labeled quadrants, each representing one way to share a skill. Top-left 'Personal' (single laptop icon). Top-right 'Team' (two people icon). Bottom-left 'Internal catalog' (building icon). Bottom-right 'Public catalog' (globe icon). Each quadrant bordered in navy with a thin Israeli-blue accent stripe at the top. Warm beige paper background, flat 2D editorial style, clean sans-serif, minimal decoration.

Editorial illustration: a vertical checklist with 10 small navy-outline checkboxes followed by short labels. The first 3 items are checked (Israeli-blue checkmark). Items top to bottom: 'em-dash grep', 'slug matches folder', 'description aloud', 'fresh session routing', 'numbers verified', 'math redone', 'files exist', 'agent icons render', 'version bumped', 'validator run'. Warm beige paper background, navy text, single Israeli-blue accent.
